message:
🐛 Add skip_dco_check_for_collaborators to DCO config (#117)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,12 +26,14 @@ lgtm:
 dco:
   # Repo-specific config takes precedence
   kubestellar/kubestellar:
+    skip_dco_check_for_collaborators: true
     trusted_apps:
       - Copilot
       - Copilot[bot]
       - copilot
       - copilot-swe-agent
   kubestellar/kubeflex:
+    skip_dco_check_for_collaborators: true
     trusted_apps:
       - Copilot
       - Copilot[bot]
